name: ait-blocks
description: Enable wordpress custom blocks like Side-panel, Search Box, Query, Button, Slider
author: Ahmed Ait Attman <aitattman@outlook.com> (https://aitattman.pages.dev)

scripts.zip-plugin: mkdir -p ait-blocks && cp -r build languages ait-blocks.php README.md LICENSE.txt ait-blocks/ && zip -r plugin.zip . -i 'ait-blocks/*' -m
scripts.zip-for-wp: mkdir -p ait-blocks && cp -r ait-blocks.php build readme.txt LICENSE.txt assets ait-blocks/ && zip -r wp-ait-blocks.zip . -i 'ait-blocks/*' -m
